description: Institutional-grade self-improvement engine (#1). Weekly reads justhodl-trades DDB, computes per-strategy Sharpe/Sortino/expectancy/profit-factor + Wilson CI + t-stats, Information Coefficients per alpha component, factor attribution OLS regression with R²/p-values, Bayesian shrinkage weight update with guardrails, champion/challenger A/B deployment. Writes audit log + proposed weights (manual approval default).

schedule.description: Weekly Sunday 09:00 UTC = 5am ET — after Saturday's trade-evaluator daily run (30d outcomes freshest)
